svg.title: RateLoop logo-ring avatar mockups
svg.desc: Avatar mockups where a logo-like continuous circle fills by voter accuracy and the multicolor ring palette is derived from the connected wallet address.
svg.text: A single continuous circle, like the RateLoop logo. Accuracy controls how much of the circle is filled; wallet address controls the multicolor gradient.

g.text: The center stays empty at every size; the continuous ring carries both identity and accuracy.
Optional faint rail keeps the zero state visible without adding an inner avatar mark.
